name: @openwaifu/domain-manage
description: OpenWaifu-Agent 域名入口、公共工作台接入与 Cloudflare 部署配置。

scripts.check: npm run build && node --check ./dist/worker.js && node --check ./scripts/deploy-worker.mjs && node --check ./scripts/ensure-public-workbench-domain.mjs && node --check ./scripts/get-public-workbench-runtime.mjs && node --check ./scripts/lib/public-workbench-domain.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:homepage && npm run ensure:workbench-domain
